evidence: Buffer-pressure coverage is B_P85_N9, RAC at 135 bar, and B_P185_N9.

The remaining soil cases lie inside this sealed input envelope; R0, RA, and RC are required load-decomposition runs and remain subject to their own full per-case gates.
starting_premise.finding: The representative-batch premise is now correct. Following the prior no-go, the batch includes both pressure endpoints and all four soil L-m corner combinations, including the true minimum and maximum condensed K/C cases, while retaining the independently released RAC center case. This is sufficient to decide whether execution may continue, but it is not a monotonicity, optimum-design, or paper-evidence conclusion.
